top_signals.title: Oil Near $100 Emerges as Consensus for Next Year With Iran War
top_signals.summary: Oil market participants are increasingly pricing crude to be capped near $100 a barrel over the next year, as demand is forced to slow down to counter millions of barrels of supply losses caused by the US-Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Don't call us just a WLFI treasury company, says AI Financial
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto Ships Eight Billionth Tonne of Iron Ore from the Pilbara
top_signals.summary: Rio Tinto has celebrated the shipment of 8 billion tonnes1 of iron ore to global markets from the Pilbara region, 60 years after the company’s first shipment set sail from Western Australia for Japan.The milestone shipment departed from Cape Lambert port aboard the Juno Horizon on May 19…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
